caption:
Fly Emirates to Dubai and get a free La Perle ticket 👇

Book your Emirates flight to Dubai by 24 Nov 2025 and enjoy a complimentary Silver ticket to the spectacular La Perle by Dragone. Valid for travel arriving 7 Nov–10 Dec 2025. Your ticket details will be in your booking confirmation.

Check details on @emirates 

Unlock even more perks in Dubai with My Emirates Pass.

#dubai #laperle #emirates #flybetter #dubaitravel #visitdubai

transcription.text: New exciting Emirates offer. Book your next flight to Dubai between November 7th and December 10th to get a complimentary ticket to the spectacular Love Pearl show.
